dares: Do your best impression of another player until someone guesses who.
Speak in an accent for the next two rounds.
Let the group pick a word you must use in every sentence for two rounds.
Show the last photo you took on your phone.
Call a contact and sing happy birthday — even if it's not their birthday.
Do 10 push-ups or jumping jacks.
Let someone rewrite your social media bio out loud.
Post a silly selfie with a caption the group chooses — or skip if no social media.
Talk without closing your mouth for one minute.
Do your best dance move for 30 seconds.
Read the last text you sent aloud.
Let the group look at your most recent music playlist for 30 seconds.
Speak only in questions until your next turn.
Swap seats with the player on your left.
Do an animal impression chosen by the group.
Hold a plank for 30 seconds.
Compliment every player with something specific.
Act out a movie scene without speaking until someone guesses it.
Wear socks on your hands for the next two rounds.
Send a nice text to someone the group picks.
Balance something on your head for 30 seconds.
Recite the alphabet backwards as fast as you can.
Let the group pick a nickname you must use for the rest of the game.
Do a dramatic reading of a random notification on your phone.
Swap an item of clothing with another player for two rounds.
Make up a 15-second commercial for an object in the room.
